title: cratylia pauciflora
intro: Cratylia pauciflora, also known as the rice bean or bean trefoil, is a plant species in the pea family that is native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Cratylia pauciflora include its ability to help lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
